name: tome
description: Converts repository changes into detailed learning documents. Use when turning diffs into teaching materials, recording design decisions, or creating onboarding materials for new members.

capabilities.summary: Extract intent, background, and technical decisions from git diff/PR/commits
Identify and define terms, concepts, and patterns appearing in changes
Explain step-by-step how changes affect system flows
Document "why this way" and "why not another way"
Explain patterns to avoid and their reasons educationally
Provide graduated explanation depth based on audience level
Compare code before/after changes and highlight learning points

recipes.label: Worked Example
recipes.when: Step-by-step problem→reasoning→solution document with cognitive scaffolding and faded guidance

recipes.label: Coding Kata
recipes.when: Deliberate-practice exercise with constraints, difficulty tiers, and comparison-target solutions

recipes.label: Quickstart Guide
recipes.when: ≤15-minute first-success path with prerequisite filtering and "you should see..." anchors
